title: Safe Nether Spawn
description: Spawns player in Nether instead of Overworld.
body:
Mod (re)spawns player in Nether. Mod doesn't just teleport the player to Nether, but finds a good place to spawn. Setting large spawnRadius recommended. This mod was made for Nether Escape modpacks.
**Yes**, you can use it in any modpack. *Mod doesn't require Fabric API.*
